description: to validate the URLs, token, and connection.
name: ip

outputs.description: The IP address MaxMind.Address The IP address
outputs.name: IP.Address

outputs.description: The IP city IP.Geo.Country The IP country
outputs.name: MaxMind.Geo.City

outputs.description: The IP country IP.Geo.Location The IP geographic location in coordinates
outputs.name: MaxMind.Geo.Country

outputs.description: The IP geographic location in coordinates MaxMind.Geo.TimeZone The time zone the IP is located
outputs.name: MaxMind.Geo.Location

outputs.description: The accuracy of the location MaxMind.Geo.Continent The IP continent
outputs.name: MaxMind.Geo.Accuracy

outputs.description: The IP subdivision IP.ASN The IP ASN
outputs.name: MaxMind.Geo.Subdivision

outputs.description: The IP ASN MaxMind.Organization The IP organization
outputs.name: MaxMind.ASN

outputs.description: Is IP a Tor exit node MaxMind.Host The IP host
outputs.name: MaxMind.Tor

outputs.description: Is the IP anonymous MaxMind.UserType The IP user type
outputs.name: MaxMind.Anonymous

outputs.description: The IP ISP MaxMind.Domain The domain associated to the IP
outputs.name: MaxMind.ISP

outputs.description: ISO code for the country the IP is located MaxMind.RegisteredCountry Country the IP is registered to
outputs.name: MaxMind.ISO_Code
